'''''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47''' was one of many [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] issues published shortly before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']]. This issue was released [[March 14]], [[2002]]. In-universe, it was published on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="22 BBY">The [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:14 corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref>

==Contents==
*'''NEWS''':
**[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] Closes Borders
**Point / Counterpoint: [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]]
**[[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] Approves Transit Tax

*'''BUSINESS''':
**[[Currency/Legends|Currency]] Upheavals Deliver Profits to [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|IBC]]
**[[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|XTS]] Cleared in Freighter Explosion

*'''REGIONAL''':
**[[Groundquake/Legends|Groundquakes]] Hit [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]] Cities
**[[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] Announce They're "Going Nowhere."
**Scientists: [[Demophon supernova|Demophon Supernova]] Imminent

*'''JEDI WATCH''':
**[[Delta-7B Aethersprite-class light interceptor|New Jedi Starfighter]] Unveiled
**[["Baby Ludi" custody case|Baby Ludi]] Holos Flood [[University of Coruscant/Legends|UoC]] Datanet

*'''SPORTS''':
**[[Team Coruscant|Coruscant]] Eliminated in [[Galactic Cup of Limmie|Galactic Cup]] Opening Round
**Yet Another [[Greenputt]] [[Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour|League]]

*'''LIFE''':
**Funding Slashed for [[General Ministry Institutes]]
**[[Halcor Raystel|Dean]] of [[University of Alderaan/Legends|Aldera]] Suspended
**[[Finis Valorum/Legends|Valorum]] & [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Gunray]] Bracket Ends of Book Sales
**New [[Xim/Legends|Xim]] Exhibit to Tour
